'''dazata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oojah|oojah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oojah|oojah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dazata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæzætæth|dæzætæth]] || [[word:dæzætæj|dæzætæj]] || [[word:dæzætæsh|dæzætæsh]] || [[word:dæzætæ|dæzætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazazatath|dazazatath]] || [[word:dazazataj|dazazataj]] || [[word:dazazatash|dazazatash]] || [[word:dazazata|dazazata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazatath|dazatath]] || [[word:dazataj|dazataj]] || [[word:dazatash|dazatash]] || [[word:dazata|dazata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazaftath|dazaftath]] || [[word:dazaftaj|dazaftaj]] || [[word:dazaftash|dazaftash]] || [[word:dazaftaf|dazaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dazatatha|dazatatha]] || [[word:dazataja|dazataja]] || [[word:dazatasha|dazatasha]] || [[word:dazataka|dazataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dazatath|dazatath]] || [[word:dazataj|dazataj]] || [[word:dazatash|dazatash]] || [[word:dazata|dazata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dazatathal|dazatathal]] || [[word:dazatajal|dazatajal]] || [[word:dazatashal|dazatashal]] || [[word:dazatakal|dazatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dazatathatha|dazatathatha]] || [[word:dazatajaja|dazatajaja]] || [[word:dazatashasha|dazatashasha]] || [[word:dazataka|dazataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dazatathan|dazatathan]] || [[word:dazatajan|dazatajan]] || [[word:dazatashan|dazatashan]] || [[word:dazatakan|dazatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dazatathaoro|dazatathaoro]] || [[word:dazatajaoro|dazatajaoro]] || [[word:dazatashaoro|dazatashaoro]] || [[word:dazatakaoro|dazatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
